utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the requested content: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, neighborhood, price, size, bedrooms, features, closing date) – fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (lender, loan amount, down payment, monthly payment, interest rate, amortization, arrangement fee) – fully specified terms.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, services, cost, timeline) – fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (service type, services, cost) – fully specified.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utilities list, property survey, total cost with breakdown) – fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property price, down payment, closing costs, total upfront, monthly mortgage, available funds, remaining buffer) – fully specified.
All items required by the format are present and detailed.
